arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund sends defiant eight-word message after scoring just his second goal in FOUR months for Man United in dramatic Bournemouth draw
arts.sum: Hojlund has only managed two club goals since December 12, and endured a 21-game goal drought across three months. Meanwhile, he has bagged only nine times in 2024-25.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth fume over red card decision as Man Utd snatch late point
arts.sum: Bournemouth were left fuming over Evanilson’s red card after Manchester United denied them victory at Dean Court on Sunday. The Cherries were leading thanks to a 23rd-minute goal from Antoine Semenyo when the Brazilian striker was sent off for going through the back of Noussair Mazraoui midway through the second half.
